narrative_arc: Open with the headline: revenue grew 23% on enterprise wins
Frame the prior quarter's plateau and the hypothesis driving the pivot
Walk through the three deals that anchored the upside
Quantify pipeline coverage going into Q4
Show the comparison vs. plan and vs. last year
Surface the two risks (concentration, ramp time) and mitigations
Lay out the Q4 commitments by segment
Close with the ask: hire 6 AEs, approve EU expansion budget

key_claims.claim: Q3 revenue grew 23% YoY on enterprise wins
Q4 pipeline coverage is 3.1x quota at $42M weighted
Top-3 customer concentration is 38% — flagged as risk
